title: Aleema (disambiguation)
content:
'''Aleema''' may refer to one of the following:

*'''[[Aleema Finn]]''', a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Omwati/Legends|Omwati]].
*'''[[Aleema Keto]]''', a [[Sith sorcerer|Sith sorceress]].
**'''[[Aleema Keto's pet]]'''
**'''[[Aleema Keto's robe]]'''
*'''[[Ytavarg Aleema]]''', a [[Shockball/Legends|shockball]] player.
**'''[[Aleemas]]''', a brand of footwear named after Ytavarg Aleema.

You may also be looking for:
*'''[[Alema]]''', a [[Twi'lek]]
*'''[[Alema Rar]]''', a [[Rutian/Legends|Rutian]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]].
**'''[[Alema Rar Task Force]]''', composed of [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], [[Zekk]], and [[Jagged Fel]] sent to defeat Rar.
{{Disambig}}
